title: Ghost
subTitle: When an inexperienced lawyer chooses to defend a young politician who is accused of murdering his wife, a spirit begins to pursue her.

title: Vidhaata The Suprimo
subTitle: Durga impresses Chandra Sekhar by killing his enemy and helping his wife get well. In reality, he is on a mission to kill Chandra Sekhar's son at the behest of his friend-turned-enemy, Visweswara Rao.

subTitle: King Vikramaditya is told twenty-five stories by a ghost, Vetal. He must find a moral lesson in each of these stories.

title: Mirza Ghalib

subTitle: A group of explorers set out to search for a magical tree in the jungle and soon find a mysterious creature is waiting to attack them.

subTitle: An auto-rickshaw driver, Raju, wants his son to have the best education. So he seizes the opportunity to win a large sum of money in a racing contest.

title: Deep Sea Python
subTitle: Chen Yue, a fisherman, sails a group of guests to a secluded island where a colossal deep-sea serpent commences a lethal assault. Subsequently, he and photographer Zhong Ming collaborate to escort the remaining survivors toward safety.

subTitle: Abhinay, a struggling artist, meets the woman of his dreams and changes his aim. However, stumbling upon the chance to star in a movie, Abhinay's life takes a drastic turn.

title: Kisi Ka Bhai Kisi Ki Jaan
subTitle: Bhaijaan, the eldest of three siblings, refuses to get married to maintain harmony in his family. However, complications arise after his brothers conspire for him to fall in love.

title: The Road
subTitle: A big road project throws the lives of Meera, a news writer, and Maya, a teacher, into chaos, changing everything they know.
